[[File:Alienation.svg|thumb]]
Alienation is one of the [[Seven Plagues|Nine Plagues]]. It is a phenomenon of alienation from your fellow [[Sapients]].<ref>{{Cite web|last=Immanuelle|date=2022-07-14|title=The Nine Plagues and Ninefold Vaccine|url=https://evolution.faith/ninefold-vaccine/|access-date=2022-11-14|website=The Church of Evolution|language=en-US}}</ref> It is the worst plague because it keeps you from finding a community to implement the [[ninefold vaccine]] with, and thus gives you the [[Plato's Lion]] problem.<ref>{{Citation|title=Reflecting on the Meaning Crisis|url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ur9NW_ANces|access-date=2022-11-14|language=en}}</ref>

Its [[vaccine]] is [[The Pride]].
[[Category:Perrenial Problems]]
[[sn:Alienation]]Many things can cause and exacerbate Alienation including the [[master slave dialectic]], [[bigotry]], [[prejudice]], [[individualism]], and [[victim blaming]], and the [[just world hypothesis]]

[[Betrayal]] is considered a [[sins against sapience|sin against sapience]] because it can induce alienation. [[Rape]] is one that specifically damages [[Eusexuality]].
==References==
[[Category:Alienation]]
[[Category:Domicide]]
[[Category:Domicide]]
[[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Alienation]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
